title: Just Maple
body:
About

Just Maple introduces maple wood to minecraft with a whole new maple grove biome, new trees, blocks and an entirely new wood variant!

Features

  • Check out the Maple Grove biome - found in mountainous areas!
  • Craft new maple wood building blocks
  • Admire the new maple trees, with falling leaf particles and fallen maple leaf litter

Compatibility

Version Loader Supported?
1.21 to 1.21.1 Fabric ✔
1.21 to 1.21.1 Forge / NeoForge / Other ✘
1.20.X and below Fabric / NeoForge / Forge / Other ✘
1.21.2 and above Fabric / NeoForge / Forge / Other ✘

Dependencies

  • Requires Fabric API

Installation

  1. Install Fabric Loader for any supported version
  2. Download Fabric API
  3. Download Essential Pedestals from Modrinth or CurseForge
  4. Place the API and mod file into your mods folder
  5. Launch the game using the Fabric profile

Credits

  • Thanks to Quadrillage for the textures

FAQ

**Q: Where can I find the maple grove biome?** A: It is about as common as the cherry grove. Look in mountainous areas, or use `/locate` to find one. **Q: How do I make the new maple wood blocks?** A: Craft them the same way you would any other wood variant.
